mainEntity.name: Does smoking affect my silicosis workers' comp settlement in Draper?
mainEntity.text: Does smoking affect my silicosis workers' comp settlement in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Smoking may reduce impairment rating but not bar Utah claim if work exposure is predominant cause per medical panel; expect 10-20% lower PPI awards.

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper construction firms blame smoking; counter with dose-response studies showing silica synergy. AMA Guides factor comorbidities. Average silicosis settlements $150K-$400K adjusted down for tobacco history. Quit documentation aids causation.

name: Impact of Smoking on Silicosis Settlements in Draper
description: Smoking may reduce impairment rating but not bar Utah claim if work exposure is predominant cause per medical panel; expect 10-20% lower PPI awards.
